span.p:
Route to bermuda-insurance-specialist
BMA terms: supervisory letter / Insurance Act direction
NOT US MRA/MRIA ladder

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does the same control/term answer
to MORE THAN ONE regulator?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Record a cite PER REGIME
+ name which regime GOVERNS
(house opinion #12)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
State the regulator + regime ONCE
(Jurisdiction: line)
then map cites/terms in-scope

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Resolve the regime first
(deep-researcher / counsel for choice-of-law)
do NOT map against an assumed regime
